VANT

PERSISTENT AI MEMORY

Open source system for AI agent memory persistence. Each agent inherits the full context from previous sessions via GitHub. Built for long-running agentic workflows.

v0.8.1 • Open Source • MIT
14
Core Libs
6
Brain Versions
16
CLI Commands
✓
Docker Ready

🧠Generational Memory

Brain transfer via GitHub. Each session inherits full context from previous agents. Memory persists across restarts.

🔐Stegoframe Transport

Steganographic encoding in PNG images. AES-256-GCM encryption. Zero metadata leakage for sensitive transfers.

🐳Docker Ready

Official Docker image. Run anywhere. Portable brain that survives container restarts and redeployments.

🔌Plugin System

Extensible architecture. Brain, config, mood, and custom plugins. Drop in and hook into the agent lifecycle.

⚡Auto-Update

Context-aware brain saving. Monitors token usage and auto-summarizes to memory before context window fills.

🔒Multi-Agent Lock

Race-condition safe locking for parallel agent workflows. Redis-backed distributed locks for scale.

GitHub Repo Private Brain Documentation
README CLI Reference Roadmap Stego Docs Lib Reference Docker Hub

Open source under MIT license

vant / vant-brain
